articles.author: Joseph Wilkins
articles.title: Bidding war erupts for world’s oldest bank as Italy’s Intesa gatecrashes BPM offer - CNBC
articles.description: Intesa on Monday announced an unsolicited offer of $35.3 billion, hoping to usurp its rival and create Europe's second-biggest ​bank by market capitalization.
articles.content:
A bidding war over Italy's Monte dei Paschi di Siena has erupted between rivals Intesa Sanpaolo and Banco BPM, with the two lenders vie for control of the world's oldest bank.
